urdu transliteration text:
Teri Ummat Ne Mere Dar Ko Jalaya Baba.
Phir Wo Jalta Howa Dar Mujh Pe Giraya Baba.
english translation text: O Father, your nation burned my door and then they dropped the burning door onto me!

urdu transliteration text:
Rakh Thi Sholay The Sehme Howay Bache Ya Dhuwan.
Mere Aangan Mein Tha Ik Sham-e-Ghareeban Ka Samaa.
Dar Hata Kar Mujhe Fiza(SA) ne Uthaya Baba.
english translation text: There were ashes and flames and distraught children. In front of me was the scene of sham-e-ghariba. After lifting the door, Fizza helped me get up, O father!

urdu transliteration text:
Laut Kar Ayi Tu Chehra Bhi Mera Zakhmi Tha.
Meri Zainab(SA) Ko Meri Peshi Ka Pehla Noha.
Mere Balon Ki Safaidi Ne Sunaya Baba.
english translation text: As I returned, my face was wound too. The first eulogy that Zainab heard was through my hair turning white, O father!

urdu transliteration text: Le Chale Qaidi Bana Kar Jo Ali(AS) Ke Dushman.Main Chora Nahi Haider(AS) Ki Abba Ka Daman.Taziyano Ne Magar Mujh Se Choraya Baba.
english translation text: Ali was taken captive, I did not let go of his cloak but the enemies forced me to let go after whipping me, O father!

urdu transliteration text:
Baith Kar Parhti Hoon Mushkil Se Namaz-e-Shab Bhi.
Phir Bhi Abbas(AS) Ki Khilqat Ki Dua Bholi Nahi.
Jab Bhi Zakhmi Howay Hathon Ko Uthaya Baba.
english translation text: With difficulty I sit to pray Namaz-e-shab, I did not forget to pray for the creation of Abbas, whenever I lifted my injured arms for Dua, O Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Zakhmi Halat Mein Bhi Dehleez Se Bahir Ayi.
Our Ali un Waliullah Bacha Kar Layi.
Ahad Jo Main Ne Kiya Tha Woh Nibhaya Baba.
english translation text: While wounded I came out to save the message of Ali-Un Waliyullah. I fulfilled the promise which I made to you, O Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Koan Sa Dar Hai Jahan Aap Ki Beti Na Gayi.
Are Baat Sunna Tu Kuja Youn Hoi Izzat Meri.
Koi Darwaze Se Bahir Nahi Aya Baba.
english translation text: Is there a door which I did not go to?But my dignity was such that no one came to listen to me, O Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Khud Yeh Dekha Hai Tere Sheher Ki Dewaron Ne.
Kaisi Gurbat Thi Hathon Mein Sitam Daron Ne.
Rasiyaan Band Ke Haider(AS) Ko Phiraya Baba.
english translation text: The walls of Medina are witness to the loneliness of Ali. The enemies tied Him in ropes and paraded Him around, O Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Jis Jaga Aap Ne Ruk Ruk Ke Ijazat Mangi.
Wahan Gustakh Musalmano Ne Baiyat Mangi.
Arey Koi Sholay Tu Koi Lakriyaan Laya Baba.
english translation text: The audacious ‘muslims’ asked for allegiance in the same place where you asked permission to enter. Some brought flames and others brought fire, O Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Arsh Our Farsh Pe :MUHSIN: Howa Kuhram Bapa.
Jis Ghari Ro Ke Wilayat Ki Shaheeda Ne Kaha.
Mujh Ko Hans Hans Ke Zamane Ne Rulaya Baba.
english translation text: In Heaven and Earth, Muhsin, There was a cry, When the first martyr for Wilayat said, “The people found joy in making me cry, O Father!”
